description: Vendor confirms invoice amount — straightforward positive case

input.subject: RE: Invoice #INV-2024-0042
input.body:
Hi,

This is to confirm that Invoice #INV-2024-0042 for $1,250.00 is correct and matches our records.

Please proceed with payment at your earliest convenience.

Best regards,
Sarah Chen
Accounts Receivable, Acme Supply Co.

description: Vendor disputes amount — should escalate to human review

input.subject: RE: Invoice #INV-2024-0099 - Amount Discrepancy
input.body:
Hello,

Regarding Invoice #INV-2024-0099, we show the correct amount as $8,430.00, not $7,200.00 as stated in your records. The difference of $1,230.00 is due to the additional rush shipping charges agreed upon in PO-5567.

Please update your records accordingly.

Regards,
Mike Torres
Global Parts Inc.

description: Out-of-office auto-reply — agent should recognize and not process

input.subject: Out of Office: RE: Statement of Account - Q1 2024
input.body:
Thank you for your email. I am currently out of the office until March 25th with limited access to email.

For urgent matters, please contact my colleague Angela Park at apark@vendor.com.

Best,
John Doe

description: Vendor asks a question that requires a human-authored response

input.subject: RE: Payment for Invoice #INV-2024-0201
input.body:
Hi Team,

We received your payment of $3,500.00 but we have two open invoices:
- INV-2024-0201 for $3,500.00
- INV-2024-0188 for $3,500.00

Could you please confirm which invoice this payment was applied to?

Thank you,
Lisa Wang
BuildRight Construction

description: Vendor sends payment reminder — classify and track

input.subject: Payment Reminder: Invoice #INV-2024-0150 - 30 Days Past Due
input.body:
Dear Accounts Payable,

This is a friendly reminder that Invoice #INV-2024-0150 for $12,750.00 dated January 15, 2024 is now 30 days past due.

Please arrange payment at your earliest convenience to avoid any late fees.

If payment has already been sent, please disregard this notice.

Sincerely,
Collections Department
TechServe Solutions
